info.english_meaning: to concentrate to focus to abstain from senses to meditate
info.hindI_arTa: citta sTira karanA mana ko rokanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: " cittavftteH DAtvarTAntarBAvAt akarmakatvam  arTAntare tu sakarmakopi ' sfjayujyoH sakarmakayoH karmavadBAvaH ' iti karmavatsUtravArtikAt " iti bAlamanoramA  samADiH = cittavfttiniroDaH  ' yunakti yuNkte yogArTe samADO yujyate Syani  yujeH saMyamanArTe vA RO yojayati yojati ' (Slo. 64 ) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yAM gatimaBiyuNkte tAM gatiM gatvA'ntato vimuYcate' (SA0 brA0 18327) aBiyuNkte raTaM turaNgeRa yunakti
'saYjayAcakzva yenAsmAn pARqavA aByayuYjata' (BA0 u0 509) aByayuYjata AkrAman Askandan
'asmAnAlakzya sannadDA aBUvanniti vA' (raGO 480) ityatra nahi SUrAH pareRa parAjitapUrvamaBiyujyanta iti malliH SyanvikaraRasya yujeH prayogo'sTAne
'SfRu yErhi mahArAja pARqavA aByayuYjata' (BA0 u0 5016) ukto'rTaH
'yaSca tvA'BiyuYjIta yudDAya' (rA0 7619) aBiyuYjIta Ahvayeta yudDaM me dehItyAmantrayeta
'na tatra vidyate kiMcid yatparEraBiyujyate' (manu0 8183) idaM me nikziptaM me dIyatAmiti nikzeptrA vyavahAreRa kAmyeta
'haMsa prayacCa me kAntAM gatirasyAstvayA hftA viBAvitEkadeSena deyaM yadaBiyujyate' (vikrama0 417).. ukto'rTaH
'tadyadi na sahase tataH svayamaBiyujyasva ete svakarmaRyaBiyujyAmahe' (mudrA0 3) ihoBayatrABiyogo vyApAraH aBiyujyasva vyApriyasva yatasva Gawasva
'vAyuryatrABiyuYjate' (=yuNkte) (SvetASva0 26) SabdamaBivyaktaM karotIti vivftiH suSrute 19416 ityatrABiyuji BizakkarmaRyupacAre'pi prayukto dfSyate

'vasizWaH kila rAkzasastvamityaBiyuktaH' (ni0 734 ityatra durga:) aBiyukto'ByAKyAto duruktaH yadA tu gamanamaBiyuktastadevApalapati na tadAtyantApahnava iti laNeva Bavati ityatyantApahnave liqvaktavya ityatra dIkzitaH prOQamanoramAyAm tatrABiyuktaH pfzwaH
'tatra hi bahUnarTAnaBiyuktaH putrAdirna jAnAmIti prativadan nihnavavAdI na Bavati' (yAjYa0 220 mitAkzarAyAm)
'aTa sa enamaBiyuktaH pratibrUyAt' (mI0 sU0 321-2 Sa0 BA0) aBiyuktaH pfzwaH
'kozWAgAre'Biyukta: syAt' (kA0 nI0 sA0 577) aBiyuktaH kftAvekzaH pratijAgaritaH
'yattvaBiyuktAH SabdArTezu SizwA iti tatrocyate--aBiyuktatarAH pakziRAM pozaRe banDane ca mlecCAH' (mI0 sU0 13510 SA0 BA0) aBiyuktA nipuRAH
'yatnenAnumitopyarTaH kuSalEranumAtfBiH aBiyuktatarEranyEranyaTEvopapAdyate' (vA0 pa0 134).. aBiyuktA vipaScitaH viSezajYAH labDavarRAH
'na jAne balavatA mahAmohenABiyuktasya vatsavivekasya kIdfSo vfttAntaH' (pra0 ca0 5) ukto'rTaH
'devi kenABiyuktAsi kena vAsi vimAnitA' (rA0 21028) aBiyuktA DarzitA kftaparABavA
'aBiyuktastu ko rAjA dAtumicCedDi medinIm' (BA0 Salya0 3161) aBiyuktaH prArTita ityarTo BAti aBiyuktaH paricite parikzipte'risenayA vyavahArapravfttAnAM taTEvottaravAdini.. iti kozaH
'anekArTABiyogepi yAvatsaMsADayed DanI' (yAjYa0 220 mitAkzarAyAM kAtyAyanavacanam) yadAneke'rTA mamEta iti prArTyante
'yatnenAnumito yorTaH kuSalEranumAtfBiH aBiyogaSatenApi sa nAnyaTopapAdyate' (nyA0 ma0).. aBiyogo yatnaH
'kusumapurABiyogaM pratyanudAsIno rAkzasaH' (mudrA0 2) aBiyogo'vaskandaH aBiyojanaM nAma yukte punaryojanamiti Sa0 brA0 94211 ityatra sAyaRaH
'viSvA agne'Biyujo vihatya' (tE0 brA0 2411) aBiyujo'BiyogAn AskandAniti sAyaRaH
'kftaparicayAM darSiteNgitAkArAM kanyAmAmizopAyato'BiyuYjIta' (kA0 sU0 5219) aBiyuYjIta AtmanA yojayet
